note: Explorer BLOCK LAG card now carries a small cascade-info line beneath the existing lag-adjust countdown. It states the active V8/V9/V10 relief-valve rule by height (V10 granular −1/60s after 600s, V9 staged −3/60s after 540s, V8 single cliff at 605s; floor E7) and ticks the next cascade step once the current block search has exceeded the start threshold, e.g. 'drop 2 lvl, next in 27s'. Pure read-only display; the rule itself lives in src/pow/casert.cpp. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
